name: Sample Insight
title: Healthcare Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) How it Works & What is it
takeaways: A practical overview of the revenue cycle, from patient access through final payment.
whyItMatters: Helps employees understand the financial and operational flow behind healthcare reimbursement.

name: Sample Insight
title: When Health Care Teams Run Short, Physician Burnout Rises
takeaways: Workforce strain affects physician well-being, team performance, and access to care.
whyItMatters: Useful context for physician enterprise, access, staffing, and care team redesign conversations.

name: Sample Insight
title: Examples of How Hospitals Are Lowering Cost and Enhancing Value
takeaways: Hospitals are using targeted operating improvements to reduce cost while preserving or improving value.
whyItMatters: Supports quality, cost transformation, and operational improvement discussions.
